anti_claims: This skill JSON seed does not flip source authority away from the current skill markdown projection.
Resolved operated-standard and acted-on-kind edges are structural route mappings, not proof the skill is complete or used correctly by agents.
Absent mechanism or concept neighbours are residual pressure, not evidence that no such neighbours exist.
Generated graph, health, and atlas projections cannot be read back as source evidence.

omitted: mechanism or concept neighbours not named by typed source mapping
omission_receipt.reason: Skill instance preserves public-safe markdown source identity, digest, and typed route mapping only. JSON parity does not prove full skill-body completeness or runtime correctness.

residual_pressure.reentry_condition: Bind skill.uses mechanism and skill.applies concept edges only when source evidence names ids.

justification.summary: The standard JSON at standards/std_microcosm_status_channel.json declares this skill route; relationships.used_by_organs=["bridge_phase_continuity_runtime", "mission_transaction_work_spine", "proof_diagnostic_evidence_spine"] names organ atlas rows whose mechanism_refs=["mechanism.bridge_phase_continuity_runtime.validates_synthetic_bridge_continuity", "mechanism.mission_transaction_work_spine.validates_public_mission_transaction_bundle", "mechanism.proof_diagnostic_evidence_spine.validates_ring2_diagnostic_evidence_membrane"] and concept_refs=["concept.formal_math_and_proof_witness_bundle", "concept.work_landing_and_continuity_control_bundle"] are the source basis for these selective skill edges. This binds only source-declared lattice neighbours and does not prove runtime correctness, release readiness, provider authority, private-body coverage, or whole-system completeness.

title: Microcosm Status Channel Refine Instance
triggers: The Status channel standard declares this refine instance skill id with status planned.
A governed skill source row is needed before standard.owns_triad.skill can resolve without treating generated projections as authority.
workflow: Read std_microcosm_status_channel JSON, its authority ceiling, validator refs, receipt refs, and lattice health before editing status_channel artifacts.
Tighten an existing instance without widening its authority ceiling, weakening validator expectations, or treating receipt presence as proof of runtime correctness.
Regenerate the skill corpus and preserve missing mechanism or concept neighbours as residual pressure unless a source mapping names them.
